'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=GG4qmwwIUJ8bT_uN9EsIftPJZFBQij51dKEl_4skZAo-1772798033-1.0.1.1-0aVL4Xc5ZeQda7xijIde86HHI3cc0ZE8KshtnMMv2UQ"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
